reason: Defendant defaulted; court relied on engineering expert report and ordered payment plus expert and attorney fees (إلزام).
Court invoked Ibn Taymiyyah on compensating litigation costs caused by the wrongdoer and awarded the claimed attorney fees.
Mudaraba capital proven by contract and cheque; defendant defaulted; court ordered return of capital after deducting received sum.
Supply contract with stamped balance confirmation; defendant defaulted; court ordered payment under Evidence Law art.29.
Defendant defaulted; consultancy contract and account statement uncontested; court accepted the claim.
Stamped balance confirmation exceeding the claim treated as conclusive evidence; defendant defaulted; claim granted.
Stamped balance confirmation and invoices; defendant defaulted; court ordered payment under Evidence Law art.29.
Stamped balance confirmation matching the claim; defendant defaulted; treated as binding evidence and granted.
Defendant's own stamped letter acknowledging the debt; defendant defaulted; court ordered payment.
Debt-rescheduling agreement and statement; defendant defaulted; presumption of subsisting debt; claim granted (final, non-appealable).
Signed and stamped balance confirmation exceeding the claim; defendant defaulted; court found debt established.
Parties reached a settlement; court ratified the sulh and bound both parties to the installment payments.
Defendant's authorized agent expressly admitted the debt; court ruled on the iqrar.
On remand from appeal, signed invoice as evidence; defendant defaulted; court accepted the claim and fees.
Partnership contract with acknowledgment of receipt; defendant did not answer; principle of capital preservation; ruling for claimant.
Defendant's agent admitted the remaining debt; claimant limited the claim to the admitted amount; court ruled on the admission.
Signed balance confirmation; defendant absent; court found it sufficient to award the remaining sum.
Sale contract and stamped confirmation amounting to admission; defendant defaulted; claim accepted.
Defendant admitted the remaining supply debt and agreed to pay; court ruled on the admission.
Defendant's agent admitted the claim amount; judicial admission is conclusive; court granted the claim.
Urgent precautionary seizure request denied: elements of seriousness and urgency not met; balance confirmation was below the claim.
Claimant admitted not resorting to mandatory mediation for a minor claim; dismissed (عدم قبول).
No mediation record attached as required for minor claims; improper filing; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Suit over share ownership brought against the LLC rather than the partner; lack of standing; dismissed.
Claim for price of sold share premature before establishing partnership; dismissed as filed before its time.
Partnership contract and promissory note on defendant's stationery; defendant defaulted; court granted capital plus fees.
Defendant could not be served; claimant failed to provide defendant's identity data; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Suit not filed by a lawyer as required; dismissed under executive regulation art.56 (عدم قبول).
Action to annul arbitral award; grounds did not fall within Arbitration Law art.50; annulment claim rejected (رفض).
Court found defendant forced claimant to litigate to recover an established right and awarded reduced attorney fees (50,000).
Plaintiff failed to draft/clarify the compensation claim despite being asked; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Compensation claim for late delivery; goods were fully received; element of damage unproven; rejected (رفض).
Appeal upheld the first-instance ruling ordering the defendant to pay the supply balance.
Urgent inspection request; plaintiff failed to attend; dismissed under executive regulation art.104 (عدم قبول).
Share-sale rescission suit brought against the company not the selling partners; lack of standing; dismissed.
Lease-to-own; contract was lease with promise to sell, not binding sale; both claims (ownership and lost-use compensation) rejected (رفض).
Stamped balance confirmation; defendant defaulted; court awarded the supply debt (fees claim alone rejected for lack of proof).
No mediation document attached before filing; mandatory for single-judge circuits; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Claim against company while claimant sought to sue the owner personally; lack of standing; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Claimant failed to provide the mediation document despite being asked; dismissed (عدم قبول).
Sale of a hospital; hospital activity not commercial; commercial court lacks specific jurisdiction (عدم اختصاص نوعي).
Dispute over shares of a listed joint-stock company; jurisdiction belongs to the securities disputes committee (عدم اختصاص).
Defendant resides in Buraidah; court lacks territorial jurisdiction (عدم اختصاص مكاني).
Plea of partial payment after the writ is an execution dispute; jurisdiction belongs to the enforcement judge (عدم اختصاص).
Defendant owned by a public corporation (administrative entity); jurisdiction belongs to administrative courts (عدم اختصاص ولائي).
Defendant's premises in Dammam; Jeddah commercial court lacks territorial jurisdiction (عدم اختصاص مكاني).
Provision of labor is a service, not a commercial act; commercial court lacks specific jurisdiction (عدم اختصاص نوعي).
Medical devices supplied to a medical complex; medical activity not commercial; lacks specific jurisdiction (عدم اختصاص نوعي).
Providing artists for an event is a service activity, not commercial; routed to the general court (عدم اختصاص نوعي).
Defendant is a hospital providing treatment services, not a trader; jurisdiction belongs to general courts (عدم اختصاص نوعي).
